name: BIOFORCE NANOSCIENCES HOLDINGS, INC.
business: BioForce Nanosciences Holdings, Inc. sells natural vitamins, minerals, nutritional supplements, powders, and beverages under the brand 'BioForce Eclipse'. The company targets active individuals, athletes, and the elderly. As of the filing, the company had no revenue and no customers in the last two fiscal years.

exposures.sentence: the Company's mission is to become a leading provider of natural vitamins, minerals and other nutritional supplements, powders and beverages, formulated to promote a healthier lifestyle for active individuals in all age ranges.

tamClaims.claim: The approximate $36.0 billion vitamin and supplement manufacturing industry grows on average 2.5% annually.
tamClaims.sentence: The approximate $36.0 billion vitamin and supplement manufacturing industry grows on average 2.5% annually.
